focus_area: FSRS scoring shipped (PR #48 → 8906ba3) + Tier E fail-closed hot-fix shipped (PR #51 → bd6f22c). The hot-fix corrected a design error I introduced in PR #48 (claimed Tier E 'matches Tier B/D' — but Tier B is fail-closed; only Tier D is fail-open). Council PR #50 r1+r2 sustained REVISE on this, which fired the §Rebutting-council-findings rule #4 correctly (sustained = fold, not rebut). Side discovery during PR #51 impl: apps/web/app/review/actions.test.ts (16 tests from PR #48) was silently skipped by vitest's include patterns — the 'load-bearing RLS-blocked consistently-passing test' cited in PR #48's reflection never ran. Fixed in PR #51 + workspace-wide audit in .harness/test-config-audit-2026-04-24.md. Total workspace tests went 375 → 401. Issue #52 filed for a CI guardrail. Reflection PR #50 updated with §COUNCIL r2/r3 capturing the full arc. Next session's target: finalize PR #50 reflection (council r3), then deploy-readiness OR #39 semantic chunking OR #52 CI guardrail impl.
notes: Completed arcs (cumulative): PR #22 (PKCE callback), PR #25 (PR #22 reflection + council-on-knowledge-content rule), PR #28 (issue #26 auth hardening), PR #29 (PR #28 reflection + #31 magic-link fold), PR #27 (magic-link template fix), PR #35 (stale-link classification a742deb), PR #37 (B2 flashcard handler e52866c), PR #42 (issue #38 /review UI 8b7977b), PR #43 (PR #42 reflection + new CLAUDE.md rules: §Rebutting council findings + §Plan-time required content), PR #48 (FSRS scoring 8906ba3), PR #49 (gitignore orphan da0c8fae), PR #51 (Tier E fail-closed bd6f22c). Open follow-ups (all filed, none blocking): #39 semantic chunking, #36 mapSupabaseError diagnostic logging, #34 Pino structured logger, #33 shared type / lint rule for monitor contract, #32 Set-Cookie rollback assertion strengthening, #20 Playwright nonce smoke, #19 PR #17 r4 nice-to-haves, #18 framework persona, #12 /diag removal, #14 CSP report-uri, #15 style-src hardening, #6 storage RLS, #7 db-tests pgTAP flake. From PR #48 era: #44 Zod runtime row validation (partially addressed by parseFsrsState, deck-card shape remains), #45 council reflection-PR detection, #46 PR title hygiene automation, #47 server-side pagination on /review. From PR #51 arc (new): #52 CI guardrail for vitest-include coverage (security persona strong-endorse). Deferred polish (unfiled): review.card_count i18n key, counter on generateIdempotencyKey fallback path, concurrent_update distinct client copy (PR #50 r1 item 5). Session pattern notes (2026-04-24 cont): §Rebutting-council-findings rule #4 fired correctly for the first time in production — sustained REVISE across rounds = fold, not rebut. The council was substantively right on fail-open; I was wrong about matching 'Tier B/D pattern' (B is closed). Working hypothesis refinement: structural rules from PR #43 work for plan/impl rounds but reflection PRs can still hallucinate; the rebuttal-vs-fold judgment hinges on rule #4. Test-config audit (.harness/test-config-audit-2026-04-24.md) documents the silent-skip discovery; all 9 workspace vitest configs now verified covered. Total workspace tests: 401 (was 375 pre-audit). Deployment requirements unchanged from PR #48: supabase db push + pnpm install for ts-fsrs@5.0.0; plus PR #51's 1-file app-layer change (no new migration). Known CI noise unchanged: db-tests flake (#7) non-blocking.
